reviews.comment:
IRRESPONSABLES...
Lamentable la falta de responsabilidad en el sector del lubricentro (BOXES) . Saqué turno mediante la app de YPF para cambio de aceite y filtros para el día sábado 7/2/26 a las 12 hs. y cuando llegué estaba cerrado el sector de BOXES. Se me informó que el día de hoy habían cerrado sector BOXES porque el personal estaba afectado a la playa de surtidores. Le expliqué que había sacado el turno mediante aplicación y que no hubo ninguna observación al respecto  pero no tuve respuesta satisfactoria. No recomiendo este lugar.
previamente tuve que venir de afuera para hacer el servicio

(Translated by Google)
IRRESPONSIBLE... The lack of responsibility in the service bay is deplorable. I made an appointment through the YPF app for an oil and filter change on Saturday, February 7th, 2026 at 12:00 PM, and when I arrived, the service bay was closed. I was informed that the service bay was closed that day because the staff was assigned to the pumps. I explained that I had made the appointment through the app and that there were no issues with it, but I didn't receive a satisfactory response. I do not recommend this place.
I had to come from out of town to get the service done.

reviewReply.comment: Estimado Daniel, por privado  le solicitamos tenga a bien hacernos saber su celular para poder contactarnos y analizar este reclamo para darle una solución.
